overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player character walks along wet sidewalks past holographic advertisements, crosses an intersection, passes a large holographic dragon installation, and observes passing traffic in a dense futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk observing neon advertisements and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying beverage advertisement with purple and white colors
overhead structure covering the pedestrian walkway with industrial metal beams
tall buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage
metal railing separating sidewalk from the street level below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, illuminated by vibrant neon billboards and holographic advertisements. The player walks forward past other pedestrians while the wet pavement reflects the colorful lights from the surrounding commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with red paved crosswalk area

events.description: exiting covered sidewalk into open intersection area with red paved crosswalk
crossing the red paved pedestrian crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the red crosswalk and walking across the intersection toward the glass building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking across the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: modern glass-enclosed elevated walkway or building facade with internal lighting
distinctive red colored pavement marking the pedestrian crossing zone

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered walkway into a more open intersection area with distinctive red pavement. A large glass elevated structure becomes visible on the left as the character crosses the pedestrian zone, while other pedestrians move through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath glass building

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath glass enclosed building structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered section approaching a large holographic dragon installation

entered.detail: large cylindrical holographic display showing an animated white dragon with teal neon base

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes more enclosed as the player walks beneath a glass building structure. The scene is dominated by the approach toward a massive holographic dragon statue glowing with teal light, while the glass corridor remains visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with holographic monument and street overlook

events.description: turning right to observe passing traffic on the street below
futuristic black sports car drives past on the street below the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: pausing to look at passing vehicles on the street before continuing along the path

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car with red taillights driving along the street

entered.detail: large circular purple neon sign with 'BRAIN WASH' text on building facade
multi-lane street with moving traffic visible below the sidewalk level

segments.scene_description: The player passes the holographic dragon and turns to overlook the street traffic. A futuristic sports car drives past on the road below while the 'BRAIN WASH' neon sign glows prominently in the background. The camera then turns back to continue along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with overhead holographic signage

events.description: entering narrower street canyon with dense overhead advertisements and signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk beneath dense layers of holographic billboards and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance under the neon signs

entered.detail: dense cluster of holographic displays and neon signs covering the buildings overhead
traffic signal showing red light at the upcoming street intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking through a narrow urban canyon with dense overhead holographic advertisements creating a canopy of light. The environment feels more enclosed as the character approaches a traffic light at the intersection, with the glass building now visible only in the far distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched downtown district that shifts from a covered commercial walkway to an open intersection and finally into a dense urban canyon. It begins on a covered sidewalk where vibrant holographic advertisements reflect off wet pavement, moving forward past pedestrians toward a more open pedestrian zone with distinctive red pavement. As the camera crosses the intersection, the space becomes more enclosed beneath a glass building structure, leading directly toward a massive, glowing teal holographic dragon. The perspective then shifts to overlook the street traffic and a prominent BRAIN WASH neon sign as a futuristic sports car drives past, before turning back to the walkway. Finally, the scene narrows into a tight urban corridor under a canopy of overhead holograms, moving toward a traffic light as the glass structure recedes into the distance.
